title: Website Launch
description: Welcome to the Team Darkness Bot website! This is the initial release with all core features including Dynamic Island, magical mouse cursor, animated background, and more.

title: Dynamic Island Integration
description: Added Dynamic Island showing bot status, version, and news ticker. The island displays real-time bot information and syncs with the bot status.

title: Stats Cards Rework
description: Complete rework of stats cards with smooth glow animation around each card. Numbers now animate when scrolling into view.

title: Easter Egg Implementation
description: Added secret Easter egg by clicking the logo 7 times. Unlock a special message and confetti celebration!

title: Twitch Integration Enhancements
description: Improved Twitch integration with better live status detection and enhanced connection flow.

title: Fixed Mouse Cursor on Mobile
description: Resolved issues with the magical mouse cursor on mobile devices. Cursor now properly hides on touch devices.

title: Dark/Light Mode Toggle
description: Added smooth animation between dark and light mode. Theme preference is saved in localStorage.

title: Bottom Navigation Rework
description: Complete redesign of bottom navigation with improved animations and active state indicators.

title: Admin Panel Security
description: Enhanced admin panel security with GitHub username verification for accessing content management features.

title: Updates & Changelogs Page
description: New dedicated page for updates, news, and changelogs. Includes easy-to-use admin panel for adding content.
